title: anisomeles × intermedia
intro: Anisomeles × intermedia is a hybrid plant species, resulting from the cross between Anisomeles malabarica and Anisomeles ilamensis. It is widely used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The plant is known to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Anisomeles × intermedia is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and topical creams, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
